description:
This quiz assesses JavaScript proficiency by testing knowledge of language features spanning ES2015 to ES2022. It is positioned as a casual, self‑paced multiple‑choice challenge with a light, encouraging tone, suitable for developers looking to gauge their modern JavaScript skill level. The difficulty is moderate, assuming familiarity with core language updates and syntax changes over recent ECMAScript versions.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) features, ES2020–ES2022 language enhancements, Modern JavaScript syntax and semantics, Module imports and component usage
Audience: Front‑end developers, JavaScript engineers, and web programmers who want to validate or refresh their knowledge of recent ECMAScript standards.
